name: Daily Protein Intake Calculator
seo_description: Use our free daily protein intake calculator to quickly estimate protein_min, protein_max based on weight, activity. No registration needed.
result_context: The protein mínima es to sedentarios; atletas need 1.6-2.0g/kg to óptima recuperación muscular.
steps: The calculador aplica The formula automatically and muestra results
mistakes: No Verify que weight estén in units correctas antes of Calculate
Redondear values intermedios antes of the calculation final (pierde precisión)
Apply results without Consider contexto individual or condiciones especiales
desc: Free online daily protein intake calculator. Enter weight and activity factor to get instant results.
